## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] I added or updated tests covering my change
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the `Unreleased` section if user facing
- [ ] I updated the README or inline docs if the public API changed
